idx_media_rec_enriched.name: idx_media_rec_enriched
idx_media_rec_enriched.where: "media"."metadata_updated_at" IS NOT NULL AND "media"."backdrop_path" IS NOT NULL

idx_media_rec_score.name: idx_media_rec_score
idx_media_rec_score.where: "media"."metadata_updated_at" IS NOT NULL AND "media"."poster_path" IS NOT NULL AND "media"."vote_count" >= 50
